name: ai-material-assets
description: Validate AI-generated city materials and sanitized curated models in the final place.

args.code:
local HttpService=game:GetService("HttpService")
local ms=game:GetService("MaterialService")
local folder=workspace:FindFirstChild("CuratedVisualAssets")
local variants={}
for _,d in ipairs(ms:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("MaterialVariant") then variants[d.Name]=true end end
local scripts,meshes,parts=0,0,0
if folder then for _,d in ipairs(folder:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("LuaSourceContainer") then scripts+=1 elseif d:IsA("MeshPart") then meshes+=1 end if d:IsA("BasePart") then parts+=1 end end end
return HttpService:JSONEncode({concrete=variants.KaijuDamagedConcrete==true,asphalt=variants.KaijuWornAsphalt==true,metal=variants.KaijuContainmentMetal==true,assets=folder and #folder:GetChildren() or 0,scripts=scripts,meshes=meshes,parts=parts})

steps.label: embedded materials and visual assets exist
